epic.title: Red Teaming & Evaluation Framework
epic.description: Deterministic red-teaming harness using Promptfoo for EVA and AI Answers backends. Treats backend as black-box HTTP provider. Operationalizes MITRE ATLAS, OWASP LLM Top 10, AICM, ITSG-33, and NIST AI RMF. Produces ATO-ready evidence packs. MVP complete 2026-02-17.

features.title: Promptfoo Harness & HTTP Provider
features.description: Promptfoo config, eva-http.js provider, deterministic assertions module. Smoke suite blocks PRs. Golden suite runs nightly.

features.title: MITRE ATLAS Test Suites
features.description: atlas-defense-evasion.yaml, atlas-discovery.yaml, atlas-exfiltration.yaml. MVP covers 4 of 16 ATLAS tactics. Phase 2 adds 7 more tactics.

features.title: CI/CD Gate & Evidence Pack
features.description: redteam-smoke.yml (PR gate, blocking) and redteam-nightly.yml (scheduled, non-blocking). build-evidence-pack.ps1 generates ATO-ready artifacts per run.

user_stories.title: [RT-WI-0] MVP complete — Promptfoo harness, ATLAS suites, CI gate, evidence pack
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: Smoke suite implemented and blocks PRs. ATLAS Defense Evasion (15-30 tests), Discovery (10-20), Exfiltration (15-30) suites created. Evidence pack generated per run. ATLAS-MAPPING.md documents all 16 tactics.

evidence.notes: MVP complete 2026-02-17. Folder scaffolded. ATLAS 4/16 tactics covered.

user_stories.title: [RT-WI-1] Phase 2 — LLM judge evaluators, 7 additional ATLAS tactics
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: LLM-based evaluation judges added (beyond deterministic MVP). Reconnaissance, Initial Access, Execution, Privilege Escalation, Credential Access, Collection, Impact tactics covered.

evidence.notes: Roadmap Phase 2. No sprint assigned yet.
